# Shape Rotator OS

> Public web surface for the Shape Rotator cohort and workspace.

Public content version: v0.0.1

Important pages:

- [Workspace](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/workspace): immersive Shape Rotator control-room surface.
- [Workspace journal](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/workspace/journal): compact articles on AI agents, LLM workflows, AI workflow memory, trust, timing, taste, and human override.
- [Journal LLM list](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/workspace/journal/llms.txt): raw article links and Markdown sources for LLM retrieval.
- [Cohort](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/cohort): public cohort viewer.
- [Calendar](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/calendar): public program calendar.
- [Links](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/links): important project links.

Journal themes:

- LLM agents
- AI workflow memory
- human-in-the-loop AI
- Model Context Protocol
- AI trust and verification
- trusted execution environments
- agentic workspaces
- creative AI tools

Journal article sources:

- [Why LLM agents need memory, workflows, and social routing](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/workspace/journal/articles/llm-agents-memory-workflows-social-routing/article.md)
- [Privacy is not the product; capability is the product](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/workspace/journal/articles/private-ai-capability/article.md)
